title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Newcastle United have won their last three home Premier League matches against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 combined. The Magpies last had a longer home league winning run against the Red Devils between 1915 and 1931. Man Utd are looking to record a Premier League double over Newcastle for the first time since the 2020-21 campaign; they won 1-0 on Boxing Day thanks to a goal from Patrick Dorgu.

title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Wolves have lost 17 of their last 18 Premier League matches against Liverpool, winning the other 3-0 in February 2023 at Molineux under Julen Lopetegui. Liverpool have won 83% of their Premier League games against Wolves, winning 19 of 23 games – that is the best win ratio of any side to face another 20+ times in the competition’s history.

title: Liverpool vs West Ham United - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Liverpool have lost just one of their last 19 Premier League games against West Ham, winning seven of the last eight since a 3-2 away loss in November 2021. West Ham have won just one of their last 52 away league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-0 in August 2015 under Slaven Bilic.

title: Leeds United vs Manchester City - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Leeds have lost each of their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost just four of their first 16 against them in the competition. Man City have won their last two away league games against Leeds – only once have they won three consecutively, doing so in their first three visits to Elland Road between 1924 and 1928.

title: Nantes vs Nimes - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
description: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germains 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

title: Chambery vs Montpellier - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
description: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory.
